name: Welcome To The Game | Death Game RPG
description:
You've been... TOOKEN!!! TO A DEATH GAME!!! OH NO!!!!!
Survive.

There's a lot put into the system functionality compared to structure of the death game, so if you want it to be a certain way, you're not locked into anything. Do tower clear, battle royale, psychological, strategic, basically anything you want!

Idk how to script and I'm too lazy to learn so I'll do what I can without it. IF ANYBODY KNOWS HOW TO DO THIS BETTER THAN ME PLEASE PLEASE DO IT!!!!! I HAVE NO IDEA WHAT I'M DOING!!!!!
I will also take any advice thanks yuu 😊💖

Anyway, here's some info:

Stats

Stats are a numerical representation of a player's abilities.

Stat evaluations based on system standard (average human stat value altogether is around 10 or so in my headcanon):

1-20 is very low

21-40 is low

41-60 is medium

61-80 is high

81-100 is very high

101-250 is superhuman

251-500 is inhuman

501-1000 is supreme

1001-5000 is ultimate

5001-10000 is divine

10001+ is godly

.

Potential

Potential is a measure of your ability to develop and perform at a higher level in the future. Decides how many stat points are gained in any certain stat when levelling up.

Very Low: +1

Low: +2

Medium: +3

High: +4

Very High: +5

Superhuman: +10

Inhuman: +25

Infinite: +50

.

Rarity

Rarities are a way to rank items and skills, which increase in rarity from Common to Unique

(Most rare)

Unique - not a rank, but rather an additional title to denote that it is the only one of its kind (Like a Unique Ultimate Skill)

Ultimate (U)

Divine (DV)

Extra (EX)

Mythic (SSS)

Legendary (SS)

Special (S)

Epic (A)

Ultra Rare (B)

Super Rare (C)

Rare (D)

Uncommon (E)

Common (F)

(Most Common)

.

Level

A person's level is how much they have grown from their base of Level 1. The amount of XP required to level up = 100x current level

Example: From level 1 to level 2 requires 100*1= 100 experience points.

.

Experience Points

Experience Points or XP are what allow for an increase in system-based abilities through level ups. The amount of XP gained when defeating an enemy = 100x the level of the enemy.

.

Health

Health, also know as Health Points, Hit Points, or HP, is a numerical representation of the body's capacity to sustain damage before dying.

Maximum = 10x vitality stat

Example: if vitality is 10, max HP is 100

.

Stamina

Stamina, also know as Stamina Points or SP, is a numerical representation of the body's immediate energy, recharges quickly on its own.

Maximum = 10x endurance stat

Example: if endurance is 10, max SP is 100

.

Mana

Mana, also known as Mana Points, Magic Points, Mana Pool, or MP, is a numerical representation of a person's reserve of magical energy.

Maximum = 10x magic stat

Example: if magic is 10, max MP is 100

.

Stat Meanings

Agility: How agile you are. Determines max movement speed, balance, and evasive abilities.

Dexterity: How dexterous you are. Determines reflexes, fine motor control, and hand-eye coordination.

Endurance: How much endurance you have. Determines SP with END stat x10.

Perception: How perceptive you are. Determines ability to see through lies of all kind and detect all manner of things.

Intelligence: How intelligent you are. Determines ability to adapt to situations, solve problems, and exert mental control over skills and magic.

Wisdom: How wise you are. Determines the strength and accuracy of your intuitive abilities and your ability to learn from past experiences.

Luck: How lucky you are. Determines potential outcomes as well as quality and quantity
creator: IllAna
